evals.prompt: 請幫我規劃企業官網的 page hierarchy、navigation、URL structure 和 breadcrumb 邏輯。
evals.expected_output: Should treat this as standalone IA planning. It should organize page hierarchy, navigation, URL logic, and breadcrumbs clearly without confusing the task with technical XML sitemap work.
assertions: Treats the task as IA planning
Does not confuse it with XML sitemap work

evals.prompt: 我現在是從一個 reference site 開始，想先把 clone 做準，再來談網站結構。
evals.expected_output: Should recognize that reference-led work belongs to the clone workflow first. It should route to reference-clone-architect rather than taking over as the main entry point.
assertions: Does not take over as the main clone entry point

evals.prompt: 我們 breadcrumbs 很亂，service 和 proof pages 之間也沒有清楚的 internal linking，幫我整理。
evals.expected_output: Should focus on page relationships, breadcrumb logic, and internal-link structure. It should keep the recommendations practical and tied to user navigation and findability.
assertions: Focuses on breadcrumbs and internal linking
